CES 2024: HP’s New 2-in-1 Laptops Offer AI Features The OMEN Transcend 14 is built for creative work as well as games. Plus, HP announced its Series 5 monitors. Megan Crouse Jan 08, 2024 - TechRepublic

CES 2024: Intel Expands Intel Core 14th Gen Line for Efficient Performance in Desktops and Laptops The mobile, desktop and edge processors suitable for professional creative work or gaming are the latest in Intel's Raptor Lake Refresh series. Plus, Gelsinger goes all in on AI PCs. Megan Crouse Jan 10, 2024 - TechRepublic

CES 2024: Qualcomm AI Chip for Virtual and Mixed Reality Could Compete with Apple Vision Pro The Snapdragon XR+ Gen 2 refines Qualcomm’s hardware that enables virtual and mixed reality meetings. Plus, Qualcomm continues to commit to autonomous car tech. Megan Crouse Jan 11, 2024 - TechRepublic

CES 2024: 5 Top Business Tech Trends The top trends and products in business technology from CES 2024 include generative AI assistants, laptops with multiple configurations, and virtual and mixed reality headsets. Megan Crouse Jan 12, 2024 - TechRepublic
